title: RUSTINS Small Job Gloss Paint Pearl Grey 250ml
features: Achieve Professional Results: Rustins Small Job Range offers a fast-drying formula that ensures a flawless finish, perfect for both amateur and experienced DIY enthusiasts
Long-Lasting Protection: Designed to provide durable protection for your wood surfaces, ensuring they withstand the test of time while maintaining their natural beauty
Easy Application Process: With its user-friendly application, you can effortlessly apply the wood stain, achieving uniform coverage without streaks or blotches, ADD TO BASKET now
Versatile Usage: Suitable for various wood types and projects, including furniture, cabinets, doors, and more, providing a versatile solution for all your woodworking needs
Superior Quality: Crafted with premium ingredients, Rustins Small Job Range guarantees exceptional quality and performance, delivering professional-grade results with every application
description: From the manufacturer About Us In 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture with £50. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the best brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. Rustins products sell throughout the UK to home DIY enthusiasts and professionals who want quality and innovative products. Rustins also exports to more than 30 countries The Quick Dry Rustins Small Job Range The Quick Dry Rustins Small Job Range offers a convenient solution for quick and efficient small-scale projects, providing high-quality finishes and ease of use Time-Saving Features : designed to dry quickly, allowing you to complete small-scale projects in a shorter amount of time.
